title: Bowen: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
summary_full: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.
summary_public: Under pressure from the polls and Gulf allies, the White House is pushing for a deal but Iran wants concessions, writes BBC's international editor.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: Trump needs this war to end but Iran is not backing down
